A function to determine the status of a number as prime or composite can be written using modulus. * * *  
The function checks if a number is divisible by any integer other than 1 and itself. *  
The result is determined by checking if the modulus operation yields a remainder of zero. * * *  
The function uses modulus to check divisibility and returns the status of the number. *  
The status is updated based on whether the number is divisible by any number other than 1 and itself. * * *  
The function returns "prime" or "composite" depending on the modulus result. *
